evals.prompt: Share my Tableau workspace with everyone
evals.expected_output: POST to /tableau/records/{recordId}/shares with accessRequestItems containing userOrGroupId: ALL_USERS, accessType: Viewer or Editor

evals.prompt: How do I remove access for a user from a workspace?
